inputs.label: Minimum
inputs.businessContext: Minimum value of the distribution (0th percentile)

businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur minimale de la distribution (0e percentile)

inputs.label: 20th Percentile
inputs.businessContext: Value at the 20th percentile (lower boundary of first quintile)

businessContext_i18n.en: Value at the 20th percentile (lower boundary of first quintile)
businessContext_i18n.tr: 20. yüzdelik dilimdeki değer (ilk beşte birlik dilimin alt sınırı)
businessContext_i18n.de: Wert am 20. Perzentil (untere Grenze des ersten Quintils)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur au 20e percentile (limite inférieure du premier quintile)
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor en el percentil 20 (límite inferior del primer quintil)

inputs.label: 40th Percentile
inputs.businessContext: Value at the 40th percentile (boundary between second and third quintile)

businessContext_i18n.en: Value at the 40th percentile (boundary between second and third quintile)
businessContext_i18n.tr: 40. yüzdelik dilimdeki değer (ikinci ve üçüncü beşte birlik dilim arasındaki sınır)
businessContext_i18n.de: Wert am 40. Perzentil (Grenze zwischen zweitem und drittem Quintil)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur au 40e percentile (limite entre le deuxième et le troisième quintile)
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor en el percentil 40 (límite entre el segundo y tercer quintil)

inputs.label: Maximum
inputs.businessContext: Maximum value of the distribution (100th percentile)

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum value of the distribution (100th percentile)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur maximale de la distribution (100e percentile)

inputs.label: Target Value
inputs.businessContext: The value to place within the distribution

businessContext_i18n.en: The value to place within the distribution
businessContext_i18n.de: Der in die Verteilung einzuordnende Wert
businessContext_i18n.fr: La valeur à placer dans la distribution
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor a colocar dentro de la distribución

formulas.q: value <= p20 ? 1 : value <= p40 ? 2 : value <= p60 ? 3 : value <= p80 ? 4 : 5

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
